title: Living in Boulder vlog 12 - 14 - 18: #16 100 miles a day, slept all day, forgot to eat

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder Vlog. I'm just getting out of bed, dude. It's 7, 7.51 p.m.s, dudes.
It took me forever to get to sleep. Oh, and I think I forgot to have dinner.
I need to remember to eat. I think I just forgot. I had a protein drink, but I just forgot to eat anymore.
I'm not hungry yet, but I, like, haven't eaten anything since the last time I went on a ride, so that was my mistake.
But whatever, you know, my body isn't, like, hungry, you know what I mean?
So, it's kind of like I'm living off of all the belly fat still, you know?
I don't need to eat. My appetite hasn't kicked in yet.
Um, so, but yeah, I gots to get up and go.
Have as big of a dinner as I can. I'll probably start riding at about 9 again, because it's 7.52 now.
So, yeah, the only thing that I'm doing with my life right now is riding my bike and sleeping, so that's pretty badass.
I'll probably get hunger pangs during this video.
I feel like I'm just about to go.
But, um, that's fun, man. I love it.
But, you know, you look at it as a job.
And then, you know, once I start feeling more energy, I can do it.
Once I quit smoking weed, I'll be able to think of other things to do and think about.
But it sure is fun to smoke a lot of weed and watch bike riddysup videos.
I see this one right here, Paris-Roubaix, 81, Bernardino.
Let's watch that one.
So, um, yeah, man.
And then, uh, so, uh, yesterday, yesterday was my fastest ride.
My other fastest was 556, like, a few days ago.
So, and I didn't feel good yesterday.
That's the weird thing.
Um, I predicted I'd do, like, 525.
I felt bad.
I felt tired and my legs hurt.
But, and now, you know, my legs feel fresh.
And I don't feel tired.
So, I should ride more today.
The problem is I don't have any food in my belly.
And I don't know if I have how many Power Bars I have.
Ooh, I need to check my mail.
Oh, but I don't think my goo came in.
Goo's taking forever to come in the mail.
That stuff is what I live on.
That's, that's what keeps me going when I ride my bike.
That stuff and my, um, alright, where's my phone?
That stuff and my energy drinks.
So, and I guess the belly fat, you know?
Um, so, yeah, that was fun.
And so today, uh, that's what I'm gonna do.
So, I'm super curious to see how fast I go today.
Because, um, you know, I should go faster because I feel fresh and I feel good and I'm getting stronger.
But I might go slow because I might get hungry or whatever.
So, you know, and run out of that type of energy.
So, anyways, that's enough, uh, that's enough speaking for now.
Um, uh, I should say, um, you know, I should say in every one of my videos at the very end of the video that streaming yourself riding your bike six hours a day, you know?
And then after I'm done with the riding, I'm gonna do the swimming and the running.
I'm gonna, I'm gonna ride my bike.
I have an electric bike.
I'm gonna ride my e-bike up to the mountains and then run in the mountains and then come back, you know?
And then show videos and demonstrate that every day.
That's a better life than game streaming, okay?
And it uses less world resources and it keeps you a better person because you're gonna learn.
Oh, in the audiobooks, you can't do that game streaming.
And it makes you physically, physically less disgusting for the people around you who have to look at you and share the world with you.
Okay, peace out.
